title: cardamine flexuosa var. fallax
intro: Cardamine flexuosa var. fallax, commonly known as autumn cress, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mustard family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of autumn cress include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and support respiratory health. Autumn cress can be consumed as a salad green, made into a tea, or used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and infusions, although its effectiveness and safety as a medicine have not been extensively scientifically studied.
